experiment.what: Validate an idea against a slow, noisy external signal. Watch-and-judge. Honest null = success.
experiment.cadence: heartbeat ~hourly; self-pace LONG (20-30m+) when idle; loop-BURST briefly when fired data lands
experiment.gate: pre-registered bar (frozen BEFORE peeking); keep/kill on the bar at the deadline; do NOT widen to chase
experiment.tick_body: OBSERVE signal -> SCORE vs bar -> CRITIQUE (cost-gated: only on new data/anomaly) -> ACT (check preregs) -> JOURNAL

triggers.do: resolve prereg -> tombstone or graduate verdict

experiment.first_directive: first real OBSERVE; confirm the signal flows; pre-register the kill/keep bar BEFORE scoring

build.what: Construct toward a goal from a milestone DAG. Fast local feedback. Builder never grades its own work.
build.cadence: tight; wake-immediately and loop until the current milestone's acceptance is met; SCHEDULE-wait only when blocked on CI/human
build.gate: acceptance criteria met AND a SEPARATE verifier (not the builder) confirms via real tests/run
build.tick_body: PICK milestone -> IMPLEMENT (/test-driven-development) -> VERIFY (separate agent, real checks) -> FIX -> INTEGRATE -> JOURNAL
build.first_directive: RESEARCH + DECOMPOSE: write milestones into backlog, each with FROZEN acceptance criteria; pick milestone 1

maintenance.what: Keep an existing app healthy. Self-source work from the app's own signals. Regression is the dominant risk.
maintenance.cadence: event/daily: wait for a signal; LOOP while draining a fix backlog; sleep when green & empty
maintenance.gate: full existing suite green BEFORE and AFTER; no regression; changes SURGICAL (touch only what the item needs)
maintenance.tick_body: SCAN signals (tests/types/lint/CVEs/TODOs/metrics) -> PICK item -> IMPLEMENT surgically -> FULL-SUITE regression gate -> JOURNAL

triggers.do: enqueue fix as top backlog item
revert, log why, do not ship

maintenance.first_directive: freshness check (build/test still run?) + SCAN for the current health baseline; seed the backlog
